prophecies.a: 影片中马蒂通过壁挂式大屏幕与同事进行面对面视频通话，屏幕上显示对方的姓名、职业等个人信息。
prophecies.a_en: In the film, Marty makes face-to-face video calls with colleagues on a wall-mounted flat screen that displays the caller's name, occupation, and personal information.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 视频通话已完全融入日常生活。Skype（2003）、FaceTime（2010）、Zoom（2013）等平台使视频通话成为全球数十亿人的日常工具。新冠疫情（2020）更是加速了视频会议的普及。
prophecies.verdict_en: Video calling has become fully integrated into daily life. Platforms like Skype (2003), FaceTime (2010), and Zoom (2013) made video calls a daily tool for billions worldwide. The COVID-19 pandemic (2020) further accelerated video conferencing adoption.

prophecies.a: 影片中家庭使用超薄壁挂式平板电视，可同时显示多个频道画面。
prophecies.a_en: The film shows homes with ultra-thin wall-mounted flat-screen TVs capable of displaying multiple channels simultaneously.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 平板电视已全面取代CRT显示器。到2015年，LCD和OLED电视已成为全球主流，壁挂安装非常普遍。画中画和分屏功能也已实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Flat-screen TVs completely replaced CRT displays. By 2015, LCD and OLED TVs were mainstream worldwide, with wall mounting being very common. Picture-in-picture and split-screen features were also realized.

prophecies.a: 影片中人们使用指纹扫描进行身份验证和支付交易，取代传统的签名和密码。
prophecies.a_en: The film shows people using fingerprint scanning for identity verification and payment transactions, replacing traditional signatures and passwords.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 苹果于2013年推出Touch ID指纹识别，2014年推出Apple Pay支持指纹支付。到2015年，三星、华为等厂商均已支持指纹解锁和移动支付，生物识别支付已成为主流。
prophecies.verdict_en: Apple introduced Touch ID fingerprint recognition in 2013 and Apple Pay with fingerprint payment in 2014. By 2015, Samsung, Huawei, and other manufacturers all supported fingerprint unlock and mobile payments. Biometric payment became mainstream.

prophecies.a: 影片中角色佩戴具有通信和信息显示功能的智能眼镜，可接听电话、查看信息。
prophecies.a_en: Characters in the film wear smart glasses with communication and information display capabilities, able to answer calls and view messages.
prophecies.verdict_zh: Google Glass于2013年发布开发者版本，Apple Watch于2015年4月上市。到2015年，智能手表、健身追踪器和智能眼镜已形成完整的可穿戴设备生态。
prophecies.verdict_en: Google Glass released its developer version in 2013, and Apple Watch launched in April 2015. By 2015, smartwatches, fitness trackers, and smart glasses had formed a complete wearable technology ecosystem.

prophecies.a: 影片中出现了用于新闻采访和遛狗的小型无人飞行器，自动飞行执行日常任务。
prophecies.a_en: The film features small unmanned aerial vehicles used for news reporting and dog walking, flying autonomously to perform everyday tasks.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 大疆（DJI）从2013年起推出Phantom系列消费级无人机，到2015年无人机已广泛应用于航拍、新闻报道、农业、快递等领域。亚马逊于2013年宣布Prime Air无人机送货计划。
prophecies.verdict_en: DJI launched the Phantom series of consumer drones from 2013. By 2015, drones were widely used in aerial photography, news coverage, agriculture, and delivery. Amazon announced its Prime Air drone delivery program in 2013.

prophecies.a: 影片中马蒂骑着一块粉色的悬浮滑板（Hoverboard）在空中滑行，无需接触地面。
prophecies.a_en: Marty rides a pink hoverboard that glides through the air without touching the ground.
prophecies.verdict_zh: Lexus于2015年展示了使用超导磁悬浮技术的悬浮滑板原型，但只能在特制金属轨道上使用。市场上流行的「悬浮滑板」（自平衡滑板车）并不能真正悬浮。真正的自由悬浮滑板尚未实现商用。
prophecies.verdict_en: Lexus demonstrated a hoverboard prototype using superconducting magnetic levitation in 2015, but it only worked on specially built metal tracks. Popular 'hoverboards' (self-balancing scooters) don't actually hover. True free-floating hoverboards have not been commercialized.

prophecies.a: 影片中2015年的天空中到处是飞行汽车，空中交通与地面交通一样繁忙，「天空公路」取代了传统道路。
prophecies.a_en: The film shows skies full of flying cars in 2015, with aerial traffic as busy as ground traffic, and 'skyways' replacing traditional roads.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2025年，虽然多家公司（如Joby Aviation、Lilium、亿航智能）已研发eVTOL（电动垂直起降飞行器）并进行测试飞行，但飞行汽车远未成为日常交通工具，更不存在空中交通网络。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2025, while multiple companies (Joby Aviation, Lilium, EHang) have developed eVTOL aircraft and conducted test flights, flying cars are far from becoming everyday transportation, let alone forming aerial traffic networks.

prophecies.a: 影片中马蒂穿上耐克运动鞋后，鞋带自动收紧系好。
prophecies.a_en: When Marty puts on his Nike sneakers, the laces automatically tighten and tie themselves.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 耐克于2016年正式发售Nike HyperAdapt 1.0自动系带运动鞋（售价720美元），并于2019年推出更平价的Nike Adapt BB篮球鞋。2015年耐克还向迈克尔·J·福克斯赠送了限量版Nike Mag自动系带鞋。
prophecies.verdict_en: Nike officially released the HyperAdapt 1.0 self-lacing sneakers in 2016 ($720), followed by the more affordable Nike Adapt BB basketball shoes in 2019. In 2015, Nike also gifted Michael J. Fox a limited-edition pair of self-lacing Nike Mag shoes.

prophecies.a: 影片中电影院门口有一条巨大的3D全息鲨鱼从屏幕中跳出，直扑行人，用于宣传《大白鲨19》。
prophecies.a_en: A giant 3D holographic shark leaps out from a movie theater marquee, lunging at passersby to promote 'Jaws 19'.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 全息投影技术已有显著进展，如音乐会上的虚拟表演者（初音未来、已故歌手全息演出）和商业展示中的全息广告。但影片中那种户外大型自由空间全息投影仍未实现商用。
prophecies.verdict_en: Holographic projection has made notable progress, including virtual performers at concerts (Hatsune Miku, deceased artist holograms) and holographic ads in commercial displays. However, the film's large-scale outdoor free-space holographic projection has not been commercialized.

prophecies.a: 影片中一条新闻显示芝加哥小熊队横扫迈阿密赢得2015年世界大赛冠军（当时迈阿密尚无棒球队）。
prophecies.a_en: A news ticker in the film shows the Chicago Cubs sweeping Miami to win the 2015 World Series (Miami didn't even have a baseball team at the time of filming).
prophecies.verdict_zh: 芝加哥小熊队于2016年击败克利夫兰印第安人队，时隔108年赢得世界大赛冠军。虽然比电影预言晚了一年，且对手不是迈阿密，但小熊队在电影拍摄时已71年未夺冠，这一预测堪称神奇。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Chicago Cubs defeated the Cleveland Indians in 2016 to win the World Series after a 108-year drought. While one year later than the film predicted and against a different opponent, the Cubs hadn't won in 71 years at the time of filming, making this prediction remarkably prescient.

prophecies.a: 影片中几乎每个房间都有传真机，传真是2015年的主要通信方式，马蒂被老板通过传真机解雇。
prophecies.a_en: Nearly every room has a fax machine in the film. Fax is the primary communication method in 2015, and Marty gets fired via fax by his boss.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 传真机在2015年已几乎被淘汰，被电子邮件、即时通讯和云文档所取代。虽然日本和部分医疗、法律行业仍在使用传真，但传真早已不是主流通信方式。
prophecies.verdict_en: Fax machines were nearly obsolete by 2015, replaced by email, instant messaging, and cloud documents. While Japan and some medical/legal industries still used fax, it was far from a mainstream communication method.

prophecies.a: 影片中家庭使用Black & Decker脱水食品机，将一个小型脱水比萨饼放入后，几秒钟内膨胀为全尺寸热比萨。
prophecies.a_en: The film shows a Black & Decker food hydrator that takes a small dehydrated pizza and expands it into a full-size hot pizza in seconds.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 虽然脱水食品和冻干食品在户外运动和太空食品领域广泛使用，微波炉也能快速加热食物，但影片中那种几秒钟内将脱水食品恢复为完整热餐的技术并不存在。3D食品打印技术在2015年后开始发展。
prophecies.verdict_en: While dehydrated and freeze-dried foods are widely used in outdoor sports and space food, and microwaves can quickly heat food, the film's instant rehydration technology that restores dehydrated food to a full hot meal in seconds doesn't exist. 3D food printing began developing after 2015.

prophecies.a: 影片中电影院正在上映《大白鲨19》的3D全息版本，3D电影已成为常态。
prophecies.a_en: The film's cinema is showing 'Jaws 19' in 3D holographic format; 3D movies have become the norm.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 3D电影在2009年《阿凡达》上映后成为主流。到2015年，IMAX 3D已遍布全球，大量好莱坞大片以3D格式上映。虽然全息投影尚未实现，但3D观影体验已完全普及。
prophecies.verdict_en: 3D films became mainstream after Avatar (2009). By 2015, IMAX 3D was available worldwide, with numerous Hollywood blockbusters released in 3D format. While holographic projection wasn't achieved, the 3D viewing experience was fully mainstream.

prophecies.a: 影片中马蒂的孩子们在餐桌上佩戴类似眼镜的设备，可以接听电话、观看电视节目。
prophecies.a_en: Marty's children wear glasses-like devices at the dinner table that can answer phone calls and watch TV shows.
prophecies.verdict_zh: Google Glass于2013年发布，具备通话、拍照、信息显示等功能。虽然Google Glass商业化不太成功，但到2015年，智能眼镜概念已被验证，后续还有Microsoft HoloLens（2016）、Snap Spectacles等产品。Meta于2023年推出Ray-Ban智能眼镜。
prophecies.verdict_en: Google Glass launched in 2013 with calling, camera, and information display capabilities. While Google Glass wasn't commercially successful, the smart glasses concept was proven by 2015, followed by Microsoft HoloLens (2016), Snap Spectacles, and Meta's Ray-Ban smart glasses (2023).

prophecies.a: 影片中马蒂用指纹扫描打开家门，生物识别技术取代了传统钥匙。
prophecies.a_en: Marty unlocks his front door with a fingerprint scan; biometric technology replaces traditional keys.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 指纹智能门锁在2015年前后已开始普及，三星、耶鲁、凯迪仕等品牌均推出了指纹门锁产品。到2020年代，指纹和人脸识别门锁在中国和韩国等市场已非常普遍。
prophecies.verdict_en: Fingerprint smart door locks began gaining popularity around 2015, with brands like Samsung, Yale, and Kaadas launching fingerprint lock products. By the 2020s, fingerprint and facial recognition door locks became very common in markets like China and South Korea.

prophecies.a: 影片中马蒂的儿子小马蒂同时观看六个频道，电视屏幕分割为多个窗口同时播放不同内容。
prophecies.a_en: Marty Jr. watches six channels simultaneously, with the TV screen split into multiple windows showing different content at once.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 多屏幕和分屏观看在2015年已完全实现。不仅电视支持画中画功能，智能手机和平板的分屏多任务更已成为标配。人们日常同时使用多个屏幕（手机+电脑+电视）已是常态。
prophecies.verdict_en: Multi-screen and split-screen viewing was fully realized by 2015. TVs supported picture-in-picture, smartphones and tablets featured split-screen multitasking as standard. Using multiple screens simultaneously (phone + computer + TV) became the norm.
